name: Comprehensive Research Methods Mindmap with Deep Nesting
input: Create a mindmap of research methodologies. Root: Research Methods. Branch 1: Quantitative. Under Quantitative: Experimental (sub: RCT, Quasi-experimental, Factorial design), Survey (sub: Cross-sectional, Longitudinal, Panel study), Secondary data analysis (sub: Meta-analysis, Systematic review). Branch 2: Qualitative. Under Qualitative: Interviews (sub: Structured, Semi-structured, Unstructured), Ethnography (sub: Participant observation, Field notes, Cultural analysis), Grounded theory (sub: Open coding, Axial coding, Selective coding). Branch 3: Mixed Methods. Under Mixed Methods: Sequential explanatory, Sequential exploratory, Convergent design, Embedded design. Show the root with 3 main branches, each with 3-4 sub-branches, and sub-sub-branches where specified. At least 25 nodes total.
qualityCriteria: Quantitative branch with Experimental, Survey, Secondary data sub-branches
Qualitative branch with Interviews, Ethnography, Grounded theory sub-branches
Mixed Methods branch present with at least 3 designs
At least 3 levels of depth (root -> branch -> sub-branch -> leaf)
Meta-analysis mentioned under Secondary data analysis
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Mindmap with root + 3 branches + 10 sub-branches + 15+ leaves, 3 levels deep, research methodology taxonomy.
